note_text: Combine diamond + triangle to make a better diamond, then another triangle, then another triangle, to get to a blue diamond for high points. Don't forget to harvest. Do the same with circle + square, + square, etc. Pattern doesn't matter.
Diamonds and triangles go together. Circles and squares go together
Only combine Triangles with Diamonds, and Squares with Circles (and vice versa both) - no other combination will work. P.s when you get to purple colour, bank it! the value wont increase.
shapes merge with the same shape e.g. triangle with triangle, patterns dont seem to matter, shapes dont seem to merge with different shapes e.g. square with diamond
Just keep matching the same shapes until the shape you have is purple then harvest.
